description: Internal accuracy benchmark cases. Image files live in benchmarks/images/ and are intentionally git-ignored.

cases.label: Souvla with readable venue text
cases.failureMode: visible text missed or packaging text over-indexed

cases.label: Kissaten HiFi matcha with cafe prep interior
cases.failureMode: new cafe missed without recent-opening and Maps-photo evidence

cases.label: RT Bistro burger/caviar-adjacent photo
cases.failureMode: generic burger or caviar keyword over-indexed

cases.label: Misleading packaging text that is not the venue name
cases.failureMode: third-party or partial packaging text treated as exact identity

cases.label: No readable text, interior-heavy cafe photo
cases.failureMode: overconfident top match from weak interior similarity

cases.label: Multi-location venue where branch should need confirmation
cases.failureMode: exact branch claimed without GPS/storefront/neighborhood evidence
